title: San Francisco Magic Theater at the Marrakech, San Francisco, California, United States — Theater Review | Condé Nast Traveler
content: # San Francisco Magic Theater at the Marrakech. **Big picture: What’s the vibe of the place, what’s it like?**. Each evening is full of laughs and nonstop how-did-he-do-it moments that stick with your long after you leave thanks to the mesmerizing (and mind-boggling) talents of mentalist and magician Jay Alexander, who performs exclusively at the Marrakech Magic Theater. It's like watching a show in your 'home theater'. Jay Alexander's performance is one-of-a-kind and can only be seen at the Marrakech Magic Theater, unless you hire him for your private corporate event. He's also appeared on *Today* and *Good Morning America*, but his complete show can only be seen at this theater in San Francisco. **If we’re going to be in town, what—and who—do you think this is best for?**. $$$ | United States, San Francisco, 125 3rd St. The St. Regis is a proper luxury hotel, with amenities worth checking in for and prime SoMA location.
